name: Cannabis Global, Inc.
summary: Cannabis Global, Inc. focuses on the development and commercialization of proprietary engineered technologies to deliver hemp extracts and cannabinoids to the human body. It also provides managerial services in areas of the regulated hemp and cannabis industries. The company was formerly known as MCTC Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Cannabis Global, Inc. in December 2019. Cannabis Global, Inc. was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
